about-p3: Whether you need a one-time analysis or ongoing GIS program support, we scale to fit your needs and timeline.
service-3-desc: High-accuracy field data capture. We structure and deliver data ready for your workflows.
about-p1: Justin Klein, founder of Klein Meridian Consulting, is a geospatial intelligence professional with extensive experience in spatial analysis, enterprise GIS systems, and geospatial data engineering. With over 10 years of experience, he has worked across infrastructure research, government deliverables, and private-sector consulting, applying advanced GIS, spatial modeling, and Python automation to solve complex geographic problems.
about-p2: Justin combines deep technical expertise with a practical, results-focused mindset—helping organizations turn spatial data into clear insights and informed decisions.
